_comment: === M12 desktop entries (removed duplicate — first match at lines 1033-1093 is used) ===
=== MOBILE OVERRIDES === These entries are used ONLY on mobile (<=820px). They override the desktop anchor of the same name (without _mobile suffix). Desktop rendering is completely unaffected.
=== M11 early mobile overrides REMOVED — corrected values at bottom of file (scale 1.7/2.0/1.8/1.6) ===
M08 visitor/avatar mobile overrides REMOVED — viewport-relative sizing handles proportionality, positions identical to desktop
=== M05 mobile overrides - scale 3.1/3.3 → 1.6/1.6 + visitors normalized ===
=== M08 mobile overrides - position-only (scale matches desktop) ===
=== M14 mobile overrides - Tool A scale 1.5 → 1.0, Tool B scale 2.5 → 1.5 ===
M08 avatar mobile override REMOVED — position identical to desktop, viewport-relative handles scale
=== T05 mobile - A scale 5.6 → 2.5, B scale 2.8 → 1.6 ===
=== T07 mobile - A scale 4.0 → 2.0, B scale 2.7 → 1.5 ===
=== T11 mobile - A scale 3.9 → 2.0, B scale 3.5 → 1.8 ===
=== T12 mobile - A scale 6.0 → 2.5, B scale 3.0 → 1.6 ===
=== T02 mobile - B scale 1.9 → 1.2, nudge x from 9.2% → 15% ===
=== T06 mobile - A scale 2.0 → 1.2, B scale 2.2 → 1.3 ===
=== T09 mobile - A scale 1.7 → 1.1, B scale 2.2 → 1.3 ===
=== M09 extras desk mobile overrides - scale 1.5 → 1.0 ===
=== M07 entrance extras mobile - frames scale 1.5 → 1.0 ===
M02 tool_a on gallery_wall_bg — scale 1.5 → 1.0, x 0.9 → 0.82 (safe bounds)
T04 tool_a on storage — scale 1.4 → 0.95, x 0.885 → 0.82
T15 tool_a on white gallery — scale 1.4 → 0.95
M09 extra_desk on storage — scale 1.5 → 1.0, x 0.839 → center
M09 extra_desk on stylized gallery — scale 1.5 → 1.0
